HeistStakesPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_15_Payout6_4: After the payout of every round is made, all winning symbols will explode allowing the symbols above them to cascade down for a new round.
HeistStakesPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_16_Payout6_5: Additional winning combination will be tallied in every round until no more winning combination can be tallied.
HeistStakesPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_18_Payout1_1: Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Scatter symbol.
HeistStakesPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_19_Payout1_2: Wild symbol appears on reels 2, 3 and 4 only.
HeistStakesPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_1_Payout2_1: During any spin, when a Wild symbol appears on reel 3, all symbols on reel 3 will be transformed into Wild symbols.
HeistStakesPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_2_Payout2_2: After the wins are paid, Wild symbols will cascade down in reel 3 until there are no more wins.
HeistStakesPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule3_1_Payout3_1: 3 Scatter symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 10 free spins. Each additional Scatter symbol will trigger 2 more free spins.
HeistStakesPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule3_2_Payout3_2: At the start of the Free Spins Feature, the win multiplier is x1.
HeistStakesPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule3_3_Payout3_3: During any free spin, if there are one or more winning symbols on the reels, after wins are paid and the new symbols have cascaded down, the win multiplier will be increased by 1 .

HeistStakesRule.Rule1_1: Heist Stakes is a 5-reel (3 rows in reels 1 and 5, 4 rows in reels 2 and 4, 5 rows in reels 3) video slot featuring Unlimited Wild symbols Feature and free spins with increasing multiplier.
HeistStakesRule.Rule1_2: The game is played with 20 base bet for 720 ways (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
HeistStakesRule.Rule1_21: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.
